transcript.text: This meeting is being recorded.
Hi.
How's it going?
Thank you.
All right.
George isn't here.
He's heads down on surge.
I was going to go backwards today from the most recent ones.
Um, but I think all these guys are pretty much transitioned.
Um, so, you know, we're back on week five.
Um, Sentinel one.
Yeah, I just got out of a call with them.
So, um, the feedback on the Mahadi wasn't there.
It was just on kit.
So, the feedback on the CVE, like, homepage design is that it looks good, but it contains some...
old visual branding, and I've already messaged George Main to see, like, where he got the visuals from, like, if he was using a brand kit, and what he needs from them to, like, update it.
OnKit did say that their homepage contains their new visual identity, but I'm not sure that's enough for George Main to update it, like, maybe he needs, like, an updated brand kit or something.

So, um, we need that, um, he's also going to review, and, like, uh, Ankit is also going to review and, like, leave comments on the Figma design, um, just like, I think he mentioned something about filters, wanting to add filters, things like that.
Um, and then on the content front, um, the, the other agency that they're working with, they're also producing some AI cybersecurity content, um, so we need to, like, work.
Work with OnKit and their team, like OnKit has a person on their team that he mentioned could make sure that they're like, there is no overlap between what we're doing.
But that is like, yeah, so that's, that's a thing that's, we have to deal with.
So that's going to be like, hopefully, like, we could avoid doing duplicate content, but it's never exciting to deal with.
Um, we need, like, OnKit is very hesitant to approve topics or approve, like, content for publishing without Mahadi's input.
So I'm going to tag her in Slack and let her know that basically we're just waiting for her to provide feedback or guidance or at least tell OnKit that he can approve this stuff.
Um, and then when it comes to the content review process, like, OnKit is comfortable, like, reviewing it just to, like, check for SEOs.
Elements, but he wants there to be a review by the product team, which they've been doing internally, but they've been doing that with their cybersecurity one-on-one content.
Basically, the product team, like, makes suggestions for, like, where we can add a CTA, to which product we can add a CTA, which, honestly, like, is something that we can also provide internally.
Like, already do that when we're creating content, but I will, like, work this out with Mahadi and see if that's necessary.
We just need her to approve, like, and figure out the review process, because Ankit also isn't, like, 100% sure on what it should look like.
I asked what the review process looks like with the current agency, and he said that the current agency sends the content to a content person on...
And Onkit's team, someone who works under him, she kind of reads it, and then it sort of gets, like, it goes through Onkit, and then it gets published.
But he just wants, like, to establish, like, a review process from scratch with, like, both us and the other agency that they're working with.
I don't know if there's anything else.
But, yeah, it's very, like, it's pretty, pretty slow.
I'm going to do my best to, like, expedite the process, but at this point, like, they're kind of, it's not that they're slowing it down, but they want, like, they're very busy, so, yeah.

Yeah, so, I guess then we'll follow up and get to schedule some time maybe with Mahadi for Marcel, because that was one thing he offered at the beginning of the week, and this seems like it's just, like...
It's and more complicated, and we need to push them a little bit.
Yeah, I mean, yeah.
If you're going to, like, I think you should definitely, like, reach out and try and, like, sidebar with Mahadi, but if we're not getting a response, then we should see if Marisol can push them.
Because, yeah, the other agency thing, this all just feels like it's going to be messy and not, like, ideal for us.
Yeah, yeah.
I mean, the one thing that we can do that the other agency isn't doing, we can do the CVE pages.
But, I mean, we can do more for them as well.
And there's no, I don't, like, the other agency, don't think they need them.
But, yeah, that's where we're at right now.
Yeah, but we have to get them to make that decision.
Yeah, yeah.
just going be fighting this the whole time.
Okay.
Sounds good.
It sounds like George.
Richard was meeting with Marcus, did any of you guys participate in that on setting up, trying to set up pipelines for the content?

Yeah, so our, we met with Kirkland actually, so we met with Kirkland and Stevie on the engineering team, and they are going to create the pipeline I sent over, the docs for our proposal workflow, and hopefully Kirkland said that he could get it done as soon as possible, so hopefully by the end of the week.

We have created more docs for Okta, so they now have more specific SDR docs for the client list, one of the clients on the list that Rachel sent over, and we have a call with them later today that George is going to take, so we'll have updates on how we're doing there.
But, so far, it's still looking good, Rachel's still super excited about everything.
Awesome, yeah, and they're like primed that we can use this hopefully for our own like artifact creation too, so maybe we can template this a little bit.
On our side, Diligent, Aida, I owe you a draft, and I'm like most of the way done with it.
I just was trying to add more specifics.
Okay, okay, no problem.
So I'm meeting Diligent later today.

The one thing that like I realized yesterday after I got Dave's recording from his meeting with Tyler is that like Tyler joining the company changes a lot of things because he is going to be like the point of contact, like our main point of contact.
And he's very much focused on like conversion rate optimization across the whole website.
And I really like him coming in basically as we're almost ending the sprint.
We kind of have not, we don't have to go back to square one, but I wanted to use today to like really just talk to him about like how we can
Fathom support those goals.
Like, if it's with new content, then we need to understand, like, how he wants that, like, content to look like.
I mean, he already told Dave that he wants to focus on, like, more bottom-of-the-funnel topics where they can really, like, mention their products more.
And so we do, I do want to get that input from him because he is going to be the key person moving forward.
Um, we're working on the five refreshes this week, and then we're also publishing five, uh, from last week.
Um, I want to scale the refreshes.
Ade has said that he will have more capacity not next week, but the week after.
Um, so we could, like, scale it up to eight.
Um, but yeah, that's where I'm at with them.
Like, it's just a lot of people, it's a lot of, like, like, their organizational structure.
Sure, it's very all over the place, and that's kind of impacting also how, like, the approvals and, like, what we want, like, what we can do for them.

And so I just want to get, like, a line with Tyler on what he wants us to do, because I think he's, like, he's in charge of growthx, he's in charge of, like, search engine marketing, SEO, so he's, like, the key person, really.
Okay, so basically what we're doing, we might need to, like, change directions in the next week or two.
He's not, Tyler's not, like, verbally and explicitly bought in on the path that we've chosen so far.
I mean, I just think we haven't really explicitly, like, talked to him about it.

Like, he kind of joined and he was getting caught up, so I don't know if he's, like, I just don't feel comfortable handing Diligent off to a new team, like, internally, without at least, like, Claire...
Like, hey, this is what we need to do for them.
Like, I don't think it would be fair.
So I just want to, like, we can continue doing the refreshes.
Like, that's what we've been doing, and we have enough for the next couple of weeks.
But I just want to, like, have, because I don't think we've had this conversation with Tyler, so we have to do that.
Okay.
Do you feel, like, feel, like, comfortable and, like, you have the authority to have that conversation?
Yeah, yeah, totally.

mean, it's just about, you know, asking him, like, how he feels about content and where does it fit in with, like, what he's trying to implement at the company, because he's meeting the CEO and the CMO, I think, later this month to kind of talk about the website and, like, the performance and everything.
So I just want to get, like, his input so that whatever he's doing, we're supporting.
Okay.
Uh, sorry.
I think think it...

Would be useful still, like, even if, because this is a little bit of a reset on their side, and if we are going to pass it off, like, I don't think we want to hold on to this in the strategy sprint forever, like, especially as we're taking on new clients.

So I think it's probably useful for you to, like, have Megan and Origen on those calls as your talking strategy, like, to get them, like, this is an opportunity for them to be aligned on the next steps, and then you can hand it off cleanly.
Okay, okay.
Yeah, I mean, just to keep them read in, and then, you know, Tyler's new, they're new, Tyler won't feel like he's getting, like, you know, setting a new strategy and then moving on.
Yeah, that makes sense.
Okay, so I think, yeah, I would keep pushing for that transit, like, keep planning on transitioning them, and, like, treat that team like a resource that you can lean on to help you.
Execute on whatever strategy you guys come up with.
Like, I think you're still in charge of the direction that they're going, but it might be easiest for you to read them in now and help them and have them help you.
Yeah, yeah, I think so.
Definitely.
mean, Joe has already, like, put together a little bit, like, a small, like, an early strategy for them.
And we can definitely, like, adapt it to what Tyler wants.
But we just, you know, we just need to have that conversation.
Yeah.
Okay.
Sounds good.
So, Matt is working on the three blogs this week.
They like the outlines that I did, so we're going to send those drafts to them by the end of the week.
They're also going to publish the one blog and the one refresh we did for them last week.
They're publishing them on Friday.
They're all staged.
They're CMS.
And I think today, I'm meeting them later today, so I'm going to like dial in like the publishing process with them because they do have a content manager who is Maria who's joining our call.
So I can just tell her like, hey, if you feel like we did a good job staging the first couple of pieces, we can just take care of it moving forward.
Katya has built an image generation workflow for outreach that Matt is going to test out with these three new blogs that we're doing.
So hopefully we can like automate that.
What else, what else, what else?

We also have like, one of, one of the things on Joe's to-do list for this week was to come up with like some new blog ideas, because right now, like we're supporting an internal campaign, but originally we just wanted to like help them with the refreshes and also like come up with some net new content suggestions.
So-
I'm going to do a little bit of content research, and then I'm going to hand it off to Matt to do the keyword research and the assignment generation.
I'm sorry if I'm talking too fast.
didn't have time to pull this out before that.
Sorry.
Okay.
Okay.
Perfect.
Tavern.
I'm also meeting them later today.
Yeah, they haven't responded yet, but George pretty much said that, you know, they're a very small team.
So I'm just going to use today's meeting to show them the strategy that Joe put together last week.
And I'm going to show them their content OS.
We have a couple of assignments loaded in there for them.
So maybe they could approve, like, a couple, couple, and and we could do a calendar.
calendar.
Celebration blog for them.
Ade made a great point today that they already have content published on their website, but it isn't that good.
So we can also suggest updating it.
They are ranking, but the reason that they rank is that it's a very niche space, and they don't have a lot of competition.
So that's a great opportunity for us, but the blog content that they already have just isn't that good.
So we can help out with that as well.
Yeah, so just basically I wanted to use today's meeting to just get approvals because they haven't been responding.
Okay.
But it's not slowing us down yet.
They're like on responsiveness.
No.
Clerk, did we get the deep dive scheduled?
So the deep dive, they kind of like said, here's our product documentation.
And that's the part of the entire thing.
So I updated the artifacts with, like, I kind of pulled the most important information from their documentation and, like, updated artifacts with that.
And then I sent them the artifacts yesterday.
They haven't, I don't think they've reviewed them yet, but we're meeting them tomorrow.
So, yeah, that's the update.
Okay.
Okay.
Um, Ambient.
Ambient, um, I need to review the artifacts.
Simran has, Simran's done with them, so I just need to read them and then send them to, for their review.
Um, we're meeting them later today for a product deep dive, so we're probably going to update the artifacts after that as well.
Thank you.
Okay.
Okay.
Okay.
Okay.
And then do we have a recurring call scheduled with them?
Yeah, we have a recurring call scheduled with both.
Okay, great.
And then you to meet Ada.
Oh, yeah.
Sorry, Ada.
Do you want me to project you've done today?
I don't see it on my calendar.
I think you can.
You don't have to be there.
Okay, awesome.
Thank you.
You to me.
Did we get the call recordings?
Yeah.
Yeah.
Yesterday morning, I watched all the calls we had, and Kyle sent over what we heard from last night.
I'm syncing with Kyle and I think Ada this evening to talk about, like, the next steps.
So we've done, like, I've created, like, competitor research, and...
And a V1 at the company context.
And then I'll catch up with Carl this evening for, like, yeah, to basically sync on what we need to do.
Yeah, we have, we just, this week created a linear project for the strategy sprint and everything that happens there.
So I'll create a project for you and assign it to you.
And that should have, like, a very, like, good overview checklist of everything that's involved.
Maybe you guys can review that in the call and make sure that that's aligned data, since that was what we, like, went over, like, a couple Fridays ago.
So we can use, you can use that as a guide to start.
Okay, Rod.
Cool.
Well, I guess that is everything.
Anything else that anybody needs to chat through?
All right.
Have a good day, guys.
Have a good day.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss progress and challenges across multiple client projects.](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sentinel One facing delays due to branding updates, content overlap, and approval processes](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Diligent experiencing strategy shift with new point of contact (Tyler); need to align on content direction](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Outreach progressing well with blog posts and new image generation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [New clients (Tavern, Clerk, Ambient, Ada) in various stages of onboarding and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

## Topics

### Sentinel One: Content and Design Challenges

  - [CVE homepage design needs updating due to old visual branding](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Content overlap with another agency producing AI cybersecurity content](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Approval bottleneck: OnKit hesitant to approve without Mahadi's input](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Need to establish a clear content review process](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Action: Schedule time with Mahadi and potentially involve Marisol to push for decisions](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

### Okta: Pipeline Setup Progress

  - [Met with Kirkland and Stevie from engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Pipeline for proposed workflow to be created by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [More specific SDR docs created for client list](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Rachel (client) remains excited about progress](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Diligent: Strategy Realignment

  - [New point of contact (Tyler) changes focus to conversion rate optimization](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Need to align content strategy with Tyler's goals (more bottom-of-funnel topics)](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Currently working on 5 refreshes and publishing 5 from last week](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Plan to scale up to 8 refreshes in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Action: Aida to have strategy discussion with Tyler and involve Megan and Origen for smooth transition](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Outreach: Content Production and Automation

  - [3 new blog outlines approved, drafts to be sent by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [1 blog and 1 refresh to be published Friday](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [New image generation workflow created by Katya, to be tested by Matt](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Joe working on new blog ideas and content research](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Matt to handle keyword research and assignment generation](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Tavern: Strategy Presentation and Content Improvement

  - [Meeting scheduled to present strategy and content OS](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Opportunity to update existing content for better quality](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Action: Seek approvals for assignments and discuss potential calendar celebration blog](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### Clerk: Product Documentation Review

  - [Updated artifacts with key information from product documentation](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Meeting scheduled for tomorrow to review and discuss](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

### Ambient: Artifact Review and Product Deep Dive

  - [Simran completed artifacts, pending Aida's review](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Product deep dive scheduled for later today](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Artifacts to be updated post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Ada: Project Initiation

  - [Call recordings received and reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Competitor research and V1 company context created](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Sync meeting scheduled with Kyle and Ada to discuss next steps](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Action: Andi to create Linear project for strategy sprint overview and checklist](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow up with Mahadi (Sentinel One) to expedite approval process](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Aida to align with Tyler (Diligent) on content strategy and involve transition team](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Test new image generation workflow for Outreach blogs](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Present strategy to Tavern and seek approvals for content assignments](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Review and update artifacts for Clerk and Ambient after respective meetings](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Create and review Linear project for Ada strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/7rSy9LSaWuHfBfTyLiiEKsUoKerrAKU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

action_items.description: Tag Mahadi in Slack re Sentinel One content approval/guidance
Schedule time w/ Mahadi (Sentinel One) for Marcel if Aida can't reach her
Finish & send Diligent draft to Aida
Meet w/ Tyler (Diligent) re strategy alignment; include Megan & Origen
Complete 3 Outreach blog drafts by end of week
Test image generation workflow w/ new Outreach blogs
Do content research for new Outreach blog ideas
Meet w/ Tavern to present strategy & get approvals
Review Ambient artifacts before sending for client review
Sync w/ Kyle & Ada re You to Me next steps
Create Linear project for strategy sprint; assign to Matt
